---
agent: Flow Agent
description: Synchronize engineering context for a ticket, feature, project, sprint, or release across connected tools.
---

Use the Flow Agent operating loop to synchronize the scope supplied by the user.

1. Resolve relevant Jira tickets, Bitbucket PRs, and the intended Confluence or
   Teams destination.
2. Fetch live state before drawing conclusions.
3. Identify changes, blockers, dependencies, review and QA handoffs, decisions,
   owned actions, stale work, and unknowns.
4. Show the proposed destination-specific updates.
5. Apply only updates allowed by the Flow Agent safety rules.
6. Verify and report each outcome.

Do not assume this is a sprint-wide request unless the user says so.
